docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.31 FILED BY JUE, JOHN DR. JUE, TARYNNE MRS. C/O LEE, SANDRA MRS. AS TO DEFENDANT BASKIN, LAURENCE DR. GOCHIN-BASKIN, MIRIAN MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
INVALID SERVICE AS TO BASKIN LAWRENCE, SERVICE MADE OUT OF CALIFORNIA.
